diagrams.title: General Frame Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the standard layout of a data frame with header, payload, and trailer
diagrams.purpose: Understanding frame composition and field purposes

diagrams.title: Bit Stuffing Process
diagrams.description: Illustrates how bits are stuffed during transmission and unstuffed at receiver
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the bit stuffing and destuffing mechanism

diagrams.title: Character Stuffing Example
diagrams.description: Shows how DLE character is used to escape special sequences
elements: At receiver, DLE DLE becomes single DLE
Frame boundary markers: DLE STX, DLE ETX
diagrams.purpose: Understanding character stuffing for data transparency

diagrams.title: HDLC Frame Types
diagrams.description: Shows the format differences between I, S, and U frames
elements: I-Frame: N(S), P/F, N(R) in control
S-Frame: 00/01/10/11 frame type, P/F, N(R) in control
U-Frame: M M M P/F M M in control
All have flag, address, FCS fields
diagrams.purpose: Differentiating between HDLC frame types and their control field usage
